evals.prompt: I need a shopping cart icon for my e-commerce website. It should be blue (#3B82F6) on a transparent background, flat style. Just give me PNG and SVG.
evals.expected_output: A flat, blue shopping cart icon exported as PNG (multiple sizes) and SVG, with transparent background

evals.prompt: Create a set of 3 icons for my presentation slides: a lightbulb (for ideas), a target/bullseye (for goals), and a handshake (for partnerships). Use gold (#D4AF37) and dark grey (#333333). I want them at 256px and 512px only.
evals.expected_output: Three icons in matching gold/dark-grey style, exported at 256px and 512px as PNG and SVG

evals.prompt: make me a little padlock icon for my app's login page, something modern and minimal, green and white colors. also need it as a favicon
evals.expected_output: A minimal padlock icon in green/white, exported as PNG, SVG, and ICO (favicon), with appropriate sizes including 16x16 and 32x32 for favicon use
